channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Humiliation for Starmer as Mandelson files reveal government by WhatsApp
item.description: Humiliation for Starmer as Mandelson files reveal government by WhatsApp

item.title: FT UK Politics: Mandelson files expose criticism of Starmer’s ‘advance/buckle’ premiership

item.title: Independent UK Politics: How I ended up in the Mandelson files
item.description: How I ended up in the Mandelson files

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Mandelson described Starmer’s No 10 operation as ‘beleaguered and bereft’ in published files – as it happened
item.description: Mandelson described Starmer’s No 10 operation as ‘beleaguered and bereft’ in published files – as it happened

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Mandelson criticised Starmer’s lack of ‘verve’ and tendency to buckle under pressure
item.description: Mandelson criticised Starmer’s lack of ‘verve’ and tendency to buckle under pressure

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
Independent UK Politics: Mandelson files latest: Former Labour peer said ministers would ‘never regret’ appointing him as US ambassador

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: An interesting exchange in the Mandelson documents where Mandelson essentially admits he is the source of a story but Number 10 agree to deny it anyway.
Just remember, when Number 10 says it "doesn't recognise" somet...
item.description:
An interesting exchange in the Mandelson documents where Mandelson essentially admits he is the source of a story but Number 10 agree to deny it anyway.
Just remember, when Number 10 says it "doesn't recognise" somet...
